channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Oil Prices Fall as Stocks Surge Following U.S.–Iran Ceasefire Agreement
item.description: Oil prices sharply fell on Tuesday after U.S. President Donald Trump announced a two-week ceasefire agreement with Iran, easing some of the tensions that have shaken global markets. West Texas Interme...

item.title: Tampa Bay Lightning Maintain Stability in Atlantic Division Amid Changing Rivalries
item.description: As the NHL's Atlantic Division sees fierce competition for playoff spots, the Tampa Bay Lightning remain a constant force. Despite emerging teams like the Buffalo Sabres and Montreal Canadiens shaking...

item.title: Trump Sets Deadline for Iran Strait Passage Amid Escalating Tensions
item.description: Tensions between the United States and Iran have reached a critical point as President Trump issued an ultimatum demanding Iran open the Strait of Hormuz to shipping. The ultimatum, delivered through ...

item.title: BINI documentary produced by iWant Originals and ABS-CBN News to stream on Netflix
item.description: The collaboration between iWant Originals and ABS-CBN News marks a milestone for the Filipino music scene as their documentary series on the all-female P-pop group BINI makes its way to Netflix this 2...

item.title: Kitui Teacher Sends Back Student’s KSh 20,000 Reward Money After Public Pressure
item.description: A teacher from Kitui County finally refunded a student KSh 20,000 that he had been withholding as the boy’s reward for good KCSE results. The student’s parents had promised to give their son KSh 800 f...

item.title: Iranian Hackers Target U.S. Energy and Water Systems in Cyberattacks
item.description: Amid escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran, Iranian-affiliated hackers have reportedly targeted U.S. critical infrastructure, including energy and water utilities. A joint advisory from the FB...

item.title: Charges Against L.A. Juvenile Hall Officers in 'Gladiator Fights' Are Being Dismissed or Reduced
item.description: Nearly half of the 30 Los Angeles County probation officers indicted last year for allegedly orchestrating or allowing youth fights in juvenile halls are seeing their cases collapse. Prosecutors have ...

item.title: 220 Ndwedwe TRC beneficiaries receive reparations totalling over R40 million
item.description: The Department of Justice and Constitutional Development handed over cheques totalling over R40 million to 220 verified Truth and Reconciliation Commission (TRC) beneficiaries in Ndwedwe, KwaZulu-Nata...

item.title: 7 Kilos of Shabu Seized in Taguig Anti-Narcotics Operation
item.description: A drug bust in Taguig led to the confiscation of seven kilos of methamphetamine, commonly known as shabu, valued at P47.6 million. The Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency (PDEA) carried out the operati...

item.title: US Democrats Warn Trump’s Iran Threat Could Spark Global Conflict, Urge Immediate Congressional Action
item.description: In Washington, Democrats in the United States House of Representatives have strongly condemned President Donald Trump’s latest threat against Iran, in which he warned that an entire civilisation could...

item.title: NASA’s Artemis II Crew Approaches the Moon in Historic Mission Footage
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission marks a major milestone in humanity’s return to deep space exploration. This mission, part of NASA’s Artemis program, is designed to take astronauts farther from Earth than a...

item.title: Mohamed Ali criticises Mombasa County for removing civic voter registration billboards
item.description: Nyali MP Mohamed Ali has raised concern over the removal of voter registration billboards in Mombasa County, accusing county officials of intimidation and abuse of power. The MP said three billboards ...

item.title: HMS Dragon undergoes short maintenance in eastern Mediterranean due to water system issue
item.description: HMS Dragon, a Type 45 destroyer of the Royal Navy, has arrived in the eastern Mediterranean to help defend British air bases in Cyprus following a recent Iranian-made drone attack on RAF Akrotiri. The...

item.title: How AI is Accelerating Drug Discovery Through Data Analysis and Protein Prediction
item.description: Artificial intelligence is transforming drug discovery by analyzing vast amounts of data and improving the efficiency of the traditionally slow and expensive process. In a webinar hosted by The Conver...

item.title: Strategies to Reduce Screen Time and Combat Doomscrolling
item.description: The article discusses a burgeoning trend called 'friction-maxxing,' a new approach to tackling the pervasive issue of doomscrolling and excessive phone use. It acknowledges the common Australian dig –...

item.title: Background and Formation of ULFA in Assam in 1979
item.description: The news article was intended to explore the historical background of the United Liberation Front of Asom (ULFA), a militant organisation in Assam, and its formation in 1979. It likely delves into the...

item.title: Commonwealth leaders reject Reform UK visa policy and reaffirm calls for reparations
item.description: Commonwealth politicians have reiterated their commitment to pursuing reparations from the UK, despite Reform UK's announcement that they would block visas for nationals of countries formally seeking ...

item.title: Concerns grow in Iran over potential power outages and security threats amid U.S. political pressure
item.description: As the deadline set by former U.S. President Donald Trump approaches, many Iranians are expressing concerns about potential power outages and the risk of further attacks. The sense of uncertainty stem...

item.title: Nigerian Cancer Society Requests Investigation Into Blessing Okoro’s Alleged Fake Cancer Donation Claims
item.description: The Nigerian Cancer Society (NCS) don come out to demand make authorities probe Blessing Okoro, wey people sabi as Blessing CEO, after reports say she allegedly fake cancer talk to collect donations f...

item.title: Godfrey Osotsi Announces 2027 Vihiga Governor Candidacy after ODM Leadership Exit
item.description: Vihiga Senator Godfrey Osotsi has officially declared his intention to contest for the Vihiga County governorship in the 2027 general election. His move comes shortly after his removal from the ODM de...
